title: Durian Furniture is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Durian Furniture is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Durian Furniture are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Durian Furniture:
Durian Furniture is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture!
